data.content: [Claude Opus 4.6 2026-03-26] Implementation review REJECTED: 99 ESLint warnings remain in listed files (max-lines, max-lines-per-function, max-len). Acceptance criteria requires zero. Files with remaining violations include: agent-adapter.ts (8), agent-history.ts (6), agent-prompt-guardrails.ts (1), beads-backend.ts (4), beads-jsonl-dto.ts (6), knots-backend.ts (6), bd.ts (12), breakdown-manager.ts (2), console-log-tap.ts (1), doctor.ts (2), execution-backend.ts (5), knots.ts (2), local-worker.ts (6), memory-manager-commands.ts, orchestration-manager.ts, registry.ts, settings.ts, terminal-manager.ts (13), terminal-time-anchor.ts (1), workflows.ts (5), terminal-store.ts (1). Prior handoff note claiming zero warnings was inaccurate.
